goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should depart from 'birmingham new street' and should 'arrive by 17:45'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'architecture' and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on tuesday and should go to cambridge
The train should depart from birmingham new street and should arrive by 17:45
Make sure you get travel time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of architecture and should be in the centre
Make sure you get phone number
